commands.review_summary:
The branch adds content-hash-backed models/auth cache validation, a provider-scoped `targetProvider` fast path in `ensureOpenClawModelsJson`, pi embedded caller wiring, tests, and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of PR head shows the validated models.json read is discarded and a separate post-validation read supplies the scoped cache hash.
commands.review_followup: Contributor or maintainer action is needed because latest-head real behavior proof is incomplete, the PR is reported unmergeable, and the remaining cache-integrity concern needs a security-aware fix/review.

commands.command: please re-review. round 7 commit `5fde6ac536` addresses the [p2] pass target hints from embedded callers finding: both pi-embedded production callers in compact.ts and run.ts now forward `targetprovider: provider` to `ensureopenclawmodelsjson`, so the scoped-cache short-circuit can actually fire in production runs. regression coverage added via exported `ensureopenclawmodelsjsonmock` in compact.hooks.harness.ts and two focused caller-wiring tests in compact.hooks.test.ts.
